subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath drawn nigh unto the Ocean and desireth to drink therefrom through this Most Great Name whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن تقرب الی البحر و اراد ان یشرب منه بهذا الاسم العظیم الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @knowledge; recognition of God, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
